body:
This uses https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/2376 to provide more useful CUDA kernel names in benchmarks.

## TODO

- [x] Can we format the kernel names with anything other than underscores as separators? --> No, all non-alphanumeric characters get converted to underscores.
- [x] Do we want to do this on the benchmarks that use `benchmark.jl`, not `benchmark_step.jl`? --> we could, but probably not useful for CI yet.
- [x] Update Buildkite pipeline to use this feature
- [x] Switch to non-dev ClimaCore
title: Update `benchmark_step.jl` for CUDA benchmarking with useful kernel names
